movies.title: Dune: Part Two
movies.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

movies.title: Oppenheimer
movies.description: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II, showing the historic scientific breakthrough and the intense political battles that followed.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.description: In Earth's future, a global crop blight and second Dust Bowl are slowly rendering the planet uninhabitable. Professor Brand, a brilliant NASA physicist, is working on plans to save mankind by transporting Earth's population to a new home via a wormhole.

movies.title: Cyber City: 2099
movies.description: In a dystopian neon-soaked future metropolis, a rogue biological synthetic agent uncovers a corporate conspiracy threatening the cybernetic minds of the global population, sparking a revolution.

movies.title: Midnight Romance
movies.description: Two strangers meet on a cross-country train ride and decide to spend a single night together in a beautiful historic European city, finding romance, companionship, and paths of transformation.

movies.title: The Silent Mirage
movies.description: When a renowned detective agrees to investigate a cold family case in a remote desert retreat, she realizes that the secrets of the sands are deeper, darker, and more dangerous than she ever anticipated.
